name: eclipticam-v1
pedestal_notes: Sensor black level in libcamera's 16-bit container — measured 2026-06-12 as the minimum mean of all deep-night (00:00-03:00 UTC) frames across 1 night of v1 data. Use as fixed zero point so 'stops above pedestal' is comparable across nights.
plate_scale_notes: OV5647 stock lens, 53.50 deg horizontal / 2592 px (official RPi figure).
max_single_exposure_notes: picamera2 video-config ceiling ~3.07 s; longer integrations must use the streaming coadd path.
night_layout_notes: TRANSITIONAL: live eclipticam/capture.py still writes to night/<night>/v1/HH/NNNN.fits.fz and day/<date>/v1/HH/NNNN.jpg. The post-split camera name 'eclipticam-v1' resolves the legacy 'v1' subcam via the percam reader. Once capture is migrated, flip to 'canonical' (per DECISIONS.md 2026-06-16).
